intended_use: The Tyto Stethoscope is an electronic stethoscope that enables transmission of auscultation sound data, whereby a clinician at one location on an IP network can listen to the auscultation sounds of a
intended_use_full: The Tyto Stethoscope is an electronic stethoscope that enables transmission of auscultation sound data, whereby a clinician at one location on an IP network can listen to the auscultation sounds of a patient on site or at a different location on the IP network with the signal carried on an IP connection between the two locations. The Tyto stethoscope is intended for use by professional users in a clinical environment or in conjunction with patients or lay users in a non-clinical environment.
other_metrics: Test results indicated the device functions as expected and is as safe and effective as its predicate devices; no specific quantitative metrics reported
